mapper.select:
select *, dis.*, dor.*, ds.nx_department_id 'nx_department_id', ds.nx_department_gb_distributer_id 'nx_department_gb_distributer_id', ds.nx_department_earliest_delivery_time 'nx_department_earliest_delivery_time', ds.nx_department_latest_delivery_time 'nx_department_latest_delivery_time', ds.nx_department_record_minutes 'nx_department_record_minutes', ds.nx_department_lat 'nx_department_lat', ds.nx_department_lng 'nx_department_lng', ds.nx_department_pick_name 'nx_department_pick_name', ds.nx_department_promotion_goods_id 'nx_department_promotion_goods_id', ds.nx_department_print_name 'nx_department_print_name', ds.nx_department_name 'nx_department_name', ds.nx_department_attr_name 'nx_department_attr_name', ds.nx_department_order_code 'nx_department_order_code', ds.nx_department_type 'nx_department_type', ds.nx_department_father_id 'nx_department_father_id', ds.nx_department_is_group_dep 'nx_department_is_group_dep', df.nx_department_id 'dd_nx_department_id', df.nx_department_name 'dd_nx_department_name', df.nx_department_attr_name 'dd_nx_department_attr_name', df.nx_department_order_code 'dd_nx_department_order_code',
dorHis.nx_department_orders_id 'dorHis_nx_department_orders_id', dorHis.nx_DO_remark 'dorHis_nx_DO_remark', dorHis.nx_DO_status 'dorHis_nx_DO_status', dorHis.nx_DO_purchase_goods_id 'dorHis_nx_Do_purchase_goods_id', dorHis.nx_DO_department_id 'dorHis_nx_DO_department_id', dorHis.nx_DO_department_father_id 'dorHis_nx_DO_department_father_id', dorHis.nx_DO_quantity 'dorHis_nx_DO_quantity', dorHis.nx_DO_standard 'dorHis_nx_DO_standard', dorHis.nx_DO_weight 'dorHis_nx_DO_weight', dorHis.nx_DO_subtotal 'dorHis_nx_DO_subtotal', dorHis.nx_DO_price 'dorHis_nx_DO_price', dorHis.nx_DO_cost_price 'dorHis_nx_DO_cost_price', dorHis.nx_DO_cost_subtotal 'dorHis_nx_DO_cost_subtotal', dorHis.nx_DO_gb_department_id 'dorHis_nx_DO_gb_department_id', dorHis.nx_DO_gb_department_father_id 'dorHis_nx_DO_gb_department_father_id',
hisDis.nx_department_id 'his_nx_department_id', hisDis.nx_department_name 'his_nx_department_name', hisDis.nx_department_attr_name 'his_nx_department_attr_name', hisDis.nx_department_order_code 'his_nx_department_order_code', hisDis.nx_department_type 'his_nx_department_type', hisDis.nx_department_father_id 'his_nx_department_father_id', hisDis.nx_department_is_group_dep 'his_nx_department_is_group_dep',
hisDf.nx_department_id 'his_dd_nx_department_id', hisDf.nx_department_name 'his_dd_nx_department_name', hisDf.nx_department_attr_name 'his_dd_nx_department_attr_name', hisDf.nx_department_order_code 'his_dd_nx_department_order_code',
hisGbDs.gb_department_id 'his_gb_department_id', hisGbDs.gb_department_name 'his_gb_department_name', hisGbDf.gb_department_id 'his_df_gb_department_id', hisGbDf.gb_department_name 'his_df_gb_department_name',
purGbDs.gb_department_id 'nds_gb_department_id', purGbDs.gb_department_sub_amount 'nds_gb_department_sub_amount', purGbDs.gb_department_name_py 'nds_gb_department_name_py', purGbDs.gb_department_type 'nds_gb_department_type', purGbDs.gb_department_name 'nds_gb_department_name', purGbDs.gb_department_attr_name 'nds_gb_department_attr_name', purGbDs.gb_department_settle_type 'nds_gb_department_settle_type', purGbDs.gb_department_father_id 'nds_gb_department_father_id', purGbDs.gb_department_file_path 'nds_gb_department_file_path', purGbDs.gb_department_is_group_dep 'nds_gb_department_is_group_dep', purGbDs.gb_department_level 'nds_gb_department_level',
purGbDf.gb_department_id 'ndf_dd_gb_department_id', purGbDf.gb_department_sub_amount 'ndf_dd_gb_department_sub_amount', purGbDf.gb_department_name 'ndf_dd_gb_department_name', purGbDf.gb_department_attr_name 'ndf_dd_gb_department_attr_name', purGbDf.gb_department_type 'ndf_dd_gb_department_type', purGbDf.gb_department_settle_type 'ndf_dd_gb_department_settle_type', purGbDf.gb_department_file_path 'ndf_dd_gb_department_file_path', purGbDf.gb_department_father_id 'ndf_dd_gb_department_father_id', purGbDf.gb_department_is_group_dep 'ndf_dd_gb_department_is_group_dep',
nr.nx_restraunt_id 'nx_restraunt_id', nr.nx_restraunt_name 'nx_restraunt_name', nr.nx_restraunt_attr_name 'nx_restraunt_attr_name', nr.nx_restraunt_min_time 'nx_restraunt_min_time', nr.nx_restraunt_max_time 'nx_restraunt_max_time',
pickUser.nx_distributer_user_id 'pick_nx_distributer_user_id', pickUser.nx_DIU_wx_avartra_url 'pick_nx_DIU_wx_avartra_url', pickUser.nx_DIU_wx_nick_name 'pick_nx_DIU_wx_nick_name',
sell_user.nx_jrdh_user_id 'sell_user_nx_jrdh_user_id', sell_user.nx_jrdh_wx_avartra_url 'sell_user_nx_jrdh_wx_avartra_url', sell_user.nx_jrdh_wx_nick_name 'sell_user_nx_jrdh_wx_nick_name', sell_user.nx_jrdh_url_change 'sell_user_nx_jrdh_url_change' # batchDep.nx_department_order_code 'batch_dep_nx_department_name'
from nx_distributer_purchase_batch as pb # left join nx_department as batchDep on batchDep.nx_department_id = pb.nx_DPB_nx_department_father_id left join nx_distributer_purchase_goods as pg on pb.nx_distributer_purchase_batch_id = pg.nx_DPG_batch_id left join nx_distributer_goods as dg on pg.nx_DPG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as ndfg on ndfg.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_grand_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as great on great.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = ndfg.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id left join nx_goods as ng_great on ng_great.nx_goods_id = great.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id left join nx_goods as ng_ndfg on ng_ndfg.nx_goods_id = ndfg.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id left join nx_goods as ng_dg on ng_dg.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id left join nx_distributer_user as du on pb.nx_DPB_pur_user_id = du.nx_distributer_user_id left join nx_distributer as dis on du.nx_DIU_distributer_id = dis.nx_distributer_id left join nx_jrdh_user as buy_user on buy_user.nx_jrdh_user_id = pb.nx_DPB_buy_user_id left join nx_jrdh_user as sell_user on sell_user.nx_jrdh_user_id = pb.nx_DPB_sell_user_id
left join nx_department_orders as dor on dor.nx_DO_purchase_goods_id = pg.nx_distributer_purchase_goods_id left join nx_distributer_user as pickUser on pickUser.nx_distributer_user_id = dor.nx_DO_pick_user_id left join nx_department as ds on ds.nx_department_id = dor.nx_DO_department_id left join nx_department as df on df.nx_department_id = ds.nx_department_father_id left join gb_department as purGbDs on purGbDs.gb_department_id = dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id left join gb_department as purGbDf on purGbDf.gb_department_id = purGbDs.gb_department_father_id left join nx_restraunt as nr on nr.nx_restraunt_id = dor.nx_DO_nx_comm_restraunt_id
left join nx_department_order_history as dorHis on dorHis.nx_DO_purchase_goods_id = pg.nx_distributer_purchase_goods_id left join nx_department as hisDis on hisDis.nx_department_id = dorHis.nx_DO_department_id left join nx_department as hisDf on hisDf.nx_department_id = hisDis.nx_department_father_id left join gb_department as hisGbDs on hisGbDs.gb_department_id = dorHis.nx_DO_gb_department_id left join gb_department as hisGbDf on hisGbDf.gb_department_id = hisGbDs.gb_department_father_id
where nx_distributer_purchase_batch_id = #{batchId} order by COALESCE(ng_great.nx_goods_sort, great.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng_ndfg.nx_goods_sort, ndfg.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng_dg.nx_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng_dg.nx_goods_sons_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort), df.nx_department_id, ds.nx_department_id, purGbDf.gb_department_id, purGbDs.gb_department_id,nr.nx_restraunt_id

select *, batchDep.nx_department_order_code 'batch_dep_nx_department_name' from nx_distributer_purchase_batch as dpb left join nx_department as batchDep on batchDep.nx_department_id = dpb.nx_DPB_nx_department_father_id where dpb.nx_distributer_purchase_batch_id = #{value}
select * from nx_distributer_purchase_batch as ndpb left join nx_distributer as nd on nd.nx_distributer_id = ndpb.nx_DPB_distributer_id where ndpb.nx_DPB_sell_user_id = #{sellId};
mapper.delete:
delete from nx_distributer_purchase_batch where nx_distributer_purchase_batch_id in
#{nxDistributerPurchaseBatchId}
mapper.select:
select -- Batch 基本信息 dpb.nx_distributer_purchase_batch_id, dpb.nx_DPB_status, dpb.nx_DPB_sell_subtotal, dpb.nx_DPB_distributer_id, batchDep.nx_department_order_code 'batch_dep_nx_department_name',
-- 买家信息 buy_user.nx_jrdh_user_id 'nx_jrdh_user_id', buy_user.nx_jrdh_wx_avartra_url 'nx_jrdh_wx_avartra_url', buy_user.nx_jrdh_wx_nick_name 'nx_jrdh_wx_nick_name', buy_user.nx_jrdh_wx_open_id 'nx_jrdh_wx_open_id',
-- 卖家信息 sell_user.nx_jrdh_user_id 'sell_user_nx_jrdh_user_id', sell_user.nx_jrdh_wx_avartra_url 'sell_user_nx_jrdh_wx_avartra_url', sell_user.nx_jrdh_wx_nick_name 'sell_user_nx_jrdh_wx_nick_name', sell_user.nx_jrdh_wx_open_id 'sell_user_nx_jrdh_wx_open_id',
-- 采购商品基本信息 dpg.nx_distributer_purchase_goods_id, dpg.nx_DPG_finish_amount, dpg.nx_DPG_quantity, dpg.nx_DPG_standard, dpg.nx_DPG_status, dpg.nx_DPG_buy_price, dpg.nx_DPG_buy_quantity, dpg.nx_DPG_buy_subtotal, dpg.nx_DPG_purchase_type, dpg.nx_DPG_orders_amount, dpg.nx_DPG_dis_goods_id, dpg.nx_DPG_dis_goods_father_id,
-- 商品基本信息 dg.nx_distributer_goods_id, dg.nx_dg_goods_brand, dg.nx_dg_goods_name, dg.nx_dg_goods_standard_weight, dg.nx_dg_goods_standardname, dg.nx_dg_carton_unit, dg.nx_dg_items_per_carton,
-- 订单基本信息 dor.nx_department_orders_id, dor.nx_DO_quantity, dor.nx_DO_standard, dor.nx_DO_print_standard, dor.nx_DO_remark, dor.nx_DO_weight, dor.nx_DO_cost_price, dor.nx_DO_cost_subtotal, dor.nx_DO_department_id, dor.nx_DO_department_father_id,
-- 部门信息 ds.nx_department_id, ds.nx_department_name, ds.nx_department_attr_name, ds.nx_department_father_id, ds.nx_department_order_code, df.nx_department_id 'dd_nx_department_id', df.nx_department_name 'dd_nx_department_name', df.nx_department_attr_name 'dd_nx_department_attr_name', df.nx_department_order_code 'dd_nx_department_order_code',
-- GB部门信息 ngds.gb_department_id 'nds_gb_department_id', ngds.gb_department_name 'nds_gb_department_name', ngds.gb_department_sub_amount 'nds_gb_department_sub_amount', ngdf.gb_department_id 'ndf_dd_gb_department_id', ngdf.gb_department_name 'ndf_dd_gb_department_name',
-- 餐厅信息 nr.nx_restraunt_id, nr.nx_restraunt_attr_name, nr.nx_restraunt_name
from nx_distributer_purchase_batch as dpb left join nx_department as batchDep on batchDep.nx_department_id = dpb.nx_DPB_nx_department_father_id left join nx_jrdh_user as buy_user on buy_user.nx_jrdh_user_id = dpb.nx_DPB_buy_user_id left join nx_jrdh_user as sell_user on sell_user.nx_jrdh_user_id = dpb.nx_DPB_sell_user_id left join nx_distributer_purchase_goods as dpg on dpg.nx_DPG_batch_id = dpb.nx_distributer_purchase_batch_id left join nx_distributer_goods as dg on dg.nx_distributer_goods_id = dpg.nx_DPG_dis_goods_id left join nx_goods as ng_dg on ng_dg.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id left join nx_department_orders as dor on dor.nx_DO_purchase_goods_id = dpg.nx_distributer_purchase_goods_id and dor.nx_DO_status < 3 left join nx_department as ds on ds.nx_department_id = dor.nx_DO_department_id left join nx_department as df on df.nx_department_id = ds.nx_department_father_id left join gb_department as ngds on ngds.gb_department_id = dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id left join gb_department as ngdf on ngdf.gb_department_id = ngds.gb_department_father_id left join nx_restraunt as nr on nr.nx_restraunt_id = dor.nx_DO_nx_comm_restraunt_id where dpb.nx_distributer_purchase_batch_id = #{batchId} order by COALESCE(ng_dg.nx_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort), ds.nx_department_id, ngds.gb_department_id, nr.nx_restraunt_id
